arts.ttl: Brennan Johnson equals Harry Kane record as red-hot Tottenham star scores AGAIN for Ange Postecoglou's side
arts.sum: Johnson found himself through on goal after a sublime ball from Dominic Solanke and duly swept his strike beyond Bart Verbruggen to give the visitors the lead.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich youngster Paul Wanner’s international decision between Germany and Austria could come down to the wire
arts.sum: Paul Wanner’s national team decision depends on his big dream, the 2026 World Cup. If the DFB can show him this perspective and agree to it, Wanner will opt for the German national team. It looks like Wanner is holding out some hope still for a Germany call-up under Julian Nagelsmann.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs Bayern Munich: Lineups are out! Thomas Müller (gasp!) is back in the XI!
arts.sum: Looks like Vincent Kompany couldn’t avoid the obvious and decided to start Thomas Müller in place of Jamal Musiala tonight. With Bayern Munich reeling from two winless games in a row, Vincent Kompany is about to experience what pressure really means.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich loanee Alexander Nübel will be the number two option against Bosnia and Herzegovina
arts.sum: Longtime Barcelona goalkeeper Marc-André ter Stegen was immediately tabbed as Neuer’s successor and started both UEFA Nations League matches in September. Nagelsmann has already stated that he expects ter Stegen to be the Germany goalkeeper for the 2026 World Cup.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala is in the pursuit of perfection
arts.sum: Musiala also discussed how his role at Bayern has evolved in the interview. Why is Bayern Munich doing so much better under Vincent Kompany compared to Thomas Tuchel?

arts.ttl: Sunday's Bundesliga predictions including Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich still interested in FC Barcelona’s Frenkie de Jong?; Manchester City to team up Dušan Vlahović with Erling Haaland?; Omar Marmoush dreams of Liverpool, Arsenal; SC Freiburg’s Merlin Röhl has fans; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is coming off of two games without a win and will be looking to add three points to its total with a tough matchup on the road against Eintracht Frankfurt. A look at the rosters and injuries for Eintracht Frankfurt and Bayern Munich .

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany on Bayern Munich so far this season; “The team is hungry!”
arts.sum: It is only early days for Vincent Kompany and Bayern Munich, but there can be no denying how well the Belgian manager has the team playing at the moment. Looking for a recap of the Champions League match between Bayern Munich and Aston Villa, along with some additional thoughts and analysis?

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl BLASTS Didi Hamann for Harry Kane criticism
arts.sum: Coming off his nonsensical jab calling Jamal Musiala a solo performer earlier this season, Hamann’s latest target is star striker Harry Kane. When asked about Hamann’s comments on Kane, Max Eberl provided a fitting response to the former constantly running his mouth about Bayern players this season.

arts.ttl: BFW Analysis: Transfer targets for Vincent Kompany’s Bayern Munich
arts.sum: The Uruguayan turned 25 this year, so his best years are still ahead of him and if Kingsley Coman really is going to be out the door in January or the summer, Zalazar would be the perfect replacement as Bayern already have enough players to play on the left but lack a true half-space player on the right, with Michael Olise being more effective in a wider role and Leroy Sané possibly seeing out his contract. However, it has been four years since this signing, and Nübel is now 28, and while that isn’t ‘old’ by any means, especially for a goalkeeper, it would be better if Bayern looked to secure the long-term future of the position, and this is where Bart Verbruggen steps in.
